description_long: This is a large, armored military transport vehicle with a boxy, angular body and six large, rugged wheels designed for off-road and urban environments. The exterior is painted in a matte dark green with orange and black stripes and a white star insignia on the sides, indicating military use. The front features a wide, reinforced windshield with protective framing and a sloped hood, while the sides have small, rectangular windows and visible ventilation grilles. The rear is flat with a large, reinforced door, likely for troop or cargo access, and red tail lights. The vehicle's body appears to be constructed from thick, armored metal panels, providing full-body protection. No visible weapon mounts are present, and the overall design emphasizes durability, protection, and mobility.
description: A large, armored military transport vehicle with six rugged wheels, matte green paint, and military insignia. It features a reinforced windshield, full-body armor, and a rear access door.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the reinforced windshield, sloped hood, and three large wheels on the visible side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the vehicle, military insignia, and all three wheels on this side.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the flat, armored rear door, tail lights, and the vehicle's boxy structure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same military insignia and wheel arrangement as the left, with visible side windows and grilles.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armored panels; reinforced front, sides, and rear; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid matte dark green with orange and black horizontal stripes; no camouflage pattern present.
attribute_military_markings: White star insignia with orange and black stripes on both sides of the vehicle.
attribute_tire_type: Six large off-road tires with deep tread pattern, suitable for rugged terrain; no visible reinforcement or chains.
